ground_truth.title: Amazon AI Careers - Build the Future of Generative AI
ground_truth.main_content: Amazon is transforming how people work and live through practical, useful generative AI. We've been developing and deploying AI and machine learning models to power customer experiences for more than 25 years. Today, with over 1,000 generative AI services and applications built or in progress—a small fraction of what we'll ultimately build—we're pioneering the future of AI agents to make customers' lives better and easier every day. We innovate across customer-facing services and internal operations, from our AI shopping assistant used by tens of millions of customers to the intelligent robots that optimize order fulfillment in our warehouses. We've launched entirely new businesses based on AI, like Alexa+, our next-generation Alexa personal assistant. And more than 100,000 enterprise customers are using the most comprehensive set of AI services, tools, and resources offered through Amazon Web Services (AWS). From groundbreaking custom silicon to pioneering frontier models, Amazon is rapidly reinventing what's possible in AI technology. Meet some of the passionate people behind our 1,000+ AI services and applications, and learn how we combine a start-up mindset with global infrastructure to build technology that makes a meaningful difference for millions of people. Our builders share how Amazon's generative AI solutions are making everyday tasks simpler, faster, and more accessible for customers worldwide. We believe in AI's power to transform your daily experiences. Whether you're discovering your next binge-worthy series on Prime Video, exploring personalized recommendations on Amazon.com, or simply asking Alexa to help manage your day, AI is there making your life easier. For businesses, our AWS AI and ML solutions are empowering enterprises to revolutionize their operations and customer experiences.
with: Amazon is transforming how people work and live through practical, useful generative AI.
We continue to build at all three layers of the generative AI stack, including best-in-class infrastructure, AI models, and AI applications.
From groundbreaking custom silicon to pioneering frontier models, Amazon is rapidly reinventing what's possible in AI technology.
If you're not failing, then you're probably not actually innovating. At Amazon, there are a lot of other people who are just as driven to work on hard problems as you are.
Join our talent network to learn about the latest AI news and career opportunities at Amazon.
without: Amazon is an equal opportunity employer
